title: SWE (SME L0)
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEInviscid
import zoomy_core.model.boundary_conditions as BC
import zoomy_core.model.initial_conditions as IC
import numpy as np

model = SMEInviscid(level=0)
description:
Shallow water equations (depth-averaged, inviscid).
$$\partial_t \begin{pmatrix} h \\ hu \end{pmatrix} + \nabla \cdot \mathbf{F}(\mathbf{Q}) + \mathbf{B}\nabla\mathbf{Q} = 0$$

title: SME L1
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEInviscid

model = SMEInviscid(level=1)
description:
Shallow Moment Equations level 1 — vertical velocity profile.
$$\partial_t \mathbf{Q} + \nabla \cdot \mathbf{F}(\mathbf{Q}) + \mathbf{B}(\mathbf{Q})\nabla\mathbf{Q} = \mathbf{S}(\mathbf{Q})$$

title: SME L2
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEInviscid

model = SMEInviscid(level=2)
description: Shallow Moment Equations level 2 — higher-order vertical profile.

title: SME (Newtonian)
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.sme_model import SMEModel

model = SMEModel(level=1)
description: Shallow Moment Equations with Newtonian viscosity and Navier slip.

title: VAM
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.vam_model import VAMModel

model = VAMModel(level=1, eigenvalue_mode='numerical')
description: Viscous Alignment Model — non-hydrostatic shallow moments with vertical velocity.

title: Scalar Advection
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.advection_model import ScalarAdvection
import numpy as np

model = ScalarAdvection(dimension=1)
model.parameter_values = np.array([1.0])
description:
Linear scalar advection.
$$\partial_t u + a \partial_x u = 0$$

title: Advection-Diffusion
template:
from zoomy_core.model.models.advection_model import ScalarAdvectionDiffusion
import numpy as np

model = ScalarAdvectionDiffusion(dimension=1, nu=0.01)
model.parameter_values = np.array([1.0, 0.01])
description:
Scalar advection-diffusion (IMEX time integration).
$$\partial_t u + a \partial_x u = \nu \partial_{xx} u$$
